prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年广西理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约3173名→2394名→1801名→1443名→1222名，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前移约1951名，近3年累计前移约579名，2025年基准位次约1222名；该校在广西理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年49人→2022年46人→2023年46人→2024年44人→2025年43人，逐年小幅缩减；2026年计划33人，较2025年缩减10人（约-23%），缩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第23位，近年排名稳定在21-25位区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全事件（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打、校方被指偏袒不作为），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微负面影响；抖音综合热度排名第74位（评价为"一般"），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；未出现在历年投档异常名单中，录取走势稳定；拥有航空宇航科学与技术（A+）、计算机科学与技术（A+）、材料科学与工程（A+）三大王牌学科，以及机械工程（A）、控制科学与工程（A-）、信息与通信工程（A-）等优势学科，在国防军工、航空航天、信息技术领域具有突出实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2026年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别，与西北工业大学优势学科高度契合，相关专业报考热度持续走高；广西2026年高考考生总数约39.2万人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约37.96万人增加约1.24万人，竞争加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市（非本省高校），在广西无本地招生倾斜；该校在广西的招生人数占其全国总招生比例较小（2025年约2.17%），属于跨省招生，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年大幅缩招（-23%）带来的竞争加剧效应、广西考生总数增加以及相关专业热度持续走高，考虑考生规模扩大和学校高层次的吸引力，小幅上调至1082名；预计2026年最低录取位次约1082名，区间920-1244名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi Science (Physics Category) were approximately 3173 → 2394 → 1801 → 1443 → 1222, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 5 years, the cumulative advancement is about 1951 places, and over the past 3 years, about 579 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1222. The university's enrollment plan for Guangxi Science (Physics Category): 2021: 49 → 2022: 46 → 2023: 46 → 2024: 44 → 2025: 43, with a slight annual reduction. The 2026 plan is 33, a reduction of 10 (about -23%) compared to 2025, a significant contraction that notably impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 23rd on the main list, with stable rankings in the 21-25 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic engineering institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety incidents (students assaulted by local criminal elements, the university accused of bias and inaction), which may have a slight negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 74th (rated as 'average'), with medium-low exposure on short video platforms. It has not appeared in any historical abnormal admission lists, and admission trends are stable. It possesses three ace disciplines: Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A+), and Materials Science and Engineering (A+), as well as advantageous disciplines like Mechanical Engineering (A), Control Science and Engineering (A-), and Information and Communication Engineering (A-), with outstanding strength in national defense, military industry, aerospace, and information technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2026 major popularity analysis, highly aligned with Northwestern Polytechnical University's advantageous disciplines, and application enthusiasm for related majors continues to rise. The total number of Guangxi Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,400 compared to the combined total of about 379,600 for Physics and History categories in 2025, intensifying competition. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province (not a local university in Guangxi), with no local admission preference in Guangxi. The university's enrollment in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion of its national total (about 2.17% in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with limited regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the intensified competition effect from the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-23%), the increase in Guangxi candidate numbers, and the rising popularity of related majors, with the expansion of candidate scale and the university's high-level appeal, the ranking is slightly adjusted upward to 1082. The estimated minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1082, with a range of 920-1244.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1082, range 920-1244. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit (within 920) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Smart Three-Aerospace Top Talent Class, Huang Yushan Aviation Class, and Computer Science. Those in the middle range (about 1000-1100) should mainly target Tier 2 Aerospace Engineering (Aviation/Space) and Electronic Information, while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper limit (about 1200 and above) should use Tier 3 Automation and Aero Engine as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi Liberal Arts (History Category) were approximately 1092 → 1081 → 1396 → 1200, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, there was a notable backward shift (1396), and in 2025 it rebounded to 1200, with a fluctuation range of about 196 in the past two years, and a baseline ranking of about 1200 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Liberal Arts (History Category) was: 3 in 2022 → 3 in 2023 → 5 in 2024 → 6 in 2025 → 6 in 2026, with 2026 remaining unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 23rd in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, and also attractive to liberal arts candidates in terms of brand; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus security incidents), but mainly involves engineering background incidents, with limited impact on liberal arts applications; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 74th (rated as 'average'), with moderate overall exposure; no abnormal admission records have occurred; Northwestern Polytechnical University is primarily engineering-oriented, with few liberal arts enrollment majors (only Economics and Trade, Business Administration), and no A-level liberal arts advantageous disciplines, but relying on the university's 985 platform, liberal arts majors still have some competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of majors related to Economics and Trade and Business Administration shows a trend of divergence and wait-and-see; finance/finance/economics majors are in a 'divergence and wait-and-see' state in the 2026 major popularity analysis; the total number of Guangxi 2026 college entrance examination candidates is about 392,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 123,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 3,800 compared to 119,200 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, with a very small number of liberal arts enrollments in Guangxi (only 6), belonging to cross-provincial sporadic enrollment, with relatively little influence from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant fluctuations in historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, and a slight increase in Guangxi history category candidates, and taking into account the expansion of the candidate pool and the attractiveness of the university's 985 level to liberal arts candidates, a slight upward adjustment to 1220 is made; the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is estimated to be about 1220, with a range of 1037-1403.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 1220, with a range of 1037-1403. There are only two liberal arts enrollment majors; candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1037) can aim for the Economics and Trade Category; those with rankings at the middle or above should primarily consider the Business Administration Category. Given the very small number of liberal arts enrollments (only 6), ranking fluctuations may be significant, so candidates are advised to fill in carefully based on their own rankings.
